protocol_name: Retrospective analytical and hardware-calibrated model-form validation
analyses: Independent reimplementation of DR-BGS and GP ablations from archived policy surfaces
Direct service-law model comparison and parametric bootstrap
Cross-hardware and cross-model normalized service-curve transport
Independent CTMC and reflected-diffusion Monte Carlo triangulation
claim_boundary: This campaign strengthens implementation, analytical, and model-form credibility. It does not constitute end-to-end hardware execution, hardware-in-the-loop controller validation, or production-safety evidence.
